---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Trier OS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: DougTrier
---

## Summary
A clear, one-sentence description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves
What problem or workflow gap does this address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work from a user perspective.

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other systems are welcome.
